headline: Travelers are turning to AI to plan trips — but hallucinations and trust gaps remain
summary: More travelers are turning to AI to plan their trips, but concerns over accuracy and trust continue to shadow the technology’s rapid adoption.

headline: 81% of Vietnamese Travelers Want to Use AI to Plan Their Next Trip, Agoda Report Finds
summary: According to the Agoda 2026 Travel Outlook Report, Vietnamese travelers are emerging as the region's most enthusiastic adopters of artificial intelligence (AI) in travel planning. The report reveals that 81% of Vietnamese travelers are likely to use AI to plan their next journey - the highest rate in Asia, where the average is 63%.
